form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into sixth behind Jays All That at Cranbourne over 2080m in a 0-2 LTW TROT on April 3 at $26. Raced better the start before that with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr5) over 1710m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was 5th-7.88 beaten 12 m by Coltrane (2:10.20) in MAIDEN on March 19 at $41. Can be there at the business end.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began badly and trailed the field.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of four months. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into sixth after being driven well back, behind Wind Storm at Charlton over 2100m in a MAIDEN on December 8 at $6. Could make a winning return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped rounding the final turn.
Galloped clear of interference near the 1400m and again near the 400m.
Broke under pressure at the 100m.
Broke gait when clear of interference at the 400m.

form.formComment: Five-year-old mare by Tennotrump out of Lu Lu Lola having her first start. Finished sixth at Bacchus Marsh in a trial on March 28 over 1940m. Draws well so could kick off with a good showing.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr1) over 2180m after showing early pace at Terang beaten 55 m by Coltrane (2:46.40) in 0-1 WIN on March 27 at $21. form.formComment: Finding that maiden win elusive. Last start 6th (Fr4) over 2190m at Maryborough, at the bell was 8th-16.4 beaten 17 m by Far As Possible (2:50.40) in MAIDEN on March 30 at $4.60. The run before 9th (Fr4) over 1690m at Kilmore, beaten 40 m by Beau Truscott (2:11.00) in MAIDEN on March 26 at $15. Fitter and capable of a lot more.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr5) over 2190m at Maryborough beaten 30 m by Far As Possible (2:50.40) in MAIDEN on March 30 at $71. Two runs back 9th (Fr5) over 1650m at Bendigo, well beaten by Calabasas (2:04.10) in MAIDEN M on March 25 at $81. Hasn't done enough yet.
